instructions.text: Listen to instructions, write key steps
instructions.audio: Listen and write the important parts

instructions_audio.audio: To make a smoothie first add one cup of milk to the blender then add a banana next add five frozen strawberries after that add one tablespoon of honey and finally blend for thirty seconds
acceptableVariations: 1 cup milk, banana, 5 strawberries, honey, blend 30s

instructions_audio.audio: To study for Friday's test first review your notes tonight then make flashcards on Wednesday next study flashcards Thursday evening and finally get good sleep Thursday night
To fix a flat tire first flip bike upside down then remove wheel next take out inner tube after that find the hole and patch it finally put everything back together
